title: Nuclei Extraction for Tissue Using Iodixanol Gradients
author: Kriegstein lab

steps.title: Stock Buffers All stock solutions should be filtered using a
steps.instruction: Stock Buffers All stock solutions should be filtered using a .22 um PVDF/PES filter system. All solutions except 50% Iodixanol solution are stable at 4c for at least 6 months. 1 M Sucrose (300 mL) Substance: Stock Conc.: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: Sucrose - 102.69 g 1 M Water - 235.5 mL - 1.0616x Homogenization Buffer Stable Solution (200 mL) Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: Sucrose 1 M 53.1 mL .2653 M KCl 2 M 2.66 mL 26.6 mM MgCl2 1 M 1.06 mL 5.31 mM Tricine-KOH pH 7.8 .75 M 5.67 mL 21.2 mM Water - 137.5 mL - Diluent Buffer (100 mL) Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: KCl 2 M 7.5 mL 150 mM MgCl2 1 M 3 mL 30 mM Tricine KOH pH 7.8 .75 M 16 mL 120 mM Water - 73.5 mL - 50% Iodixanol Solution (50 mL) **Remake Monthly for Stability Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: Diluent Buffer - 8.3 mL - Iodixanol 60% 41.7 mL 50% 1x Homogenization Buffer Unstable Solution for 4 reactions Prepare Fresh Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: HB stable solution 1.0616X 7536 uL 1X DTT 1 M 8 uL 1 mM Spermidine 500 mM 8 uL .5 mM Spermine 150 mM 8 uL .15 mM NP40 10% 240 uL .3% cOmplete PI 100X 80 uL 1X (diluted in HB stable) Ribolock 40U/uL 120 uL .6 U/uL 30% Iodixanol Solution per reaction Prepare Fresh Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: HB unstable - 240 uL - 50% Iodixanol Solution 50% 360 uL 30% 40% Iodixanol Solution per reaction Prepare Fresh Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: HB unstable - 120 uL - 50% Iodixanol Solution 50% 480 uL 40% Wash Buffer 1 mL for 4 reactions Prepare Fresh Substance: Stock conc: Amount: Final conc. in working solution: Tris-HCl pH 7.4 1 M 10 uL 10 mM NaCl 5 M 2 uL 10 mM MgCl2 1 M 3 uL 3 mM BSA 30% 33.3 uL 1% Tween-20 10% 10 uL .1% DTT 1 M 1 uL 1 mM Ribolock 40 U/uL 15 uL .6 U/uL

steps.title: pre-chill swinging bucket centrifuge and a...
steps.instruction: pre-chill swinging bucket centrifuge and a fixed angle centrifuge to 4c

steps.title: Pre-chill dounces and pestles to 4c on ice
steps.instruction: Pre-chill dounces and pestles to 4c on ice

steps.title: Fill up 2 L beaker with...
steps.instruction: Fill up 2 L beaker with 500 mL sterile water to soak the used Dounces

steps.title: place 20-50 mg frozen tissue or...
steps.instruction: place 20-50 mg frozen tissue or crushed into pre-chilled 7 mL dounce containing 1 mL cold 1x HB

steps.title: Dounce with "A" loose pestle until...
steps.instruction: Dounce with "A" loose pestle until resistance goes away (~10 strokes)

steps.title: Dounce with "B" tight pestle until...
steps.instruction: Dounce with "B" tight pestle until resistance goes away (~15 strokes)

steps.title: Place "A" and "B" into sterile...
steps.instruction: Place "A" and "B" into sterile water to soak for cleaning later

steps.title: Filter during transfer into FACS tube
steps.instruction: Filter during transfer into FACS tube

steps.title: Place Dounce into beaker with sterile...
steps.instruction: Place Dounce into beaker with sterile water to soak for cleaning later

steps.title: Pellet nuclei by spinning 5 min...
steps.instruction: Pellet nuclei by spinning 5 min at 4c at 350 xg in a fixed angle centrifuge

steps.title: Remove 950 uL of supernatant (50 uL remaining)
steps.instruction: Remove 950 uL of supernatant (50 uL remaining)

steps.title: Gently resuspend nuclei in 350 uL 1x HB
steps.instruction: Gently resuspend nuclei in 350 uL 1x HB

steps.title: Add 1 volume (400 uL) of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume (400 uL) of 50% Iodixanol solution and pipette mix

steps.title: Slowly layer 600 uL of 30%...
steps.instruction: Slowly layer 600 uL of 30% Iodixanol solution under the 25% mixture. Wipe side of pipette tip with kimwipe to avoid mixing layers.

steps.title: Layer 600 uL 40% Iodixanol solution under the 30% mixture
steps.instruction: Layer 600 uL 40% Iodixanol solution under the 30% mixture. Wipe side of pipette tip with kimwipe to avoid mixing layers.

steps.title: In a pre-chilled swinging bucket centrifuge,...
steps.instruction: In a pre-chilled swinging bucket centrifuge, spin for 20 min at 4c at 3000 xg with the brake off. Set acceleration level to 1 and deceleration at 0. (centrifuge time=23 min, time to stop=13 min)

steps.title: Slowly extract top layers in increments...
steps.instruction: Slowly extract top layers in increments of 200 uL down to 200-300 uL of nuclei band between 30% and 40% interface.

steps.title: Take 200 uL of the nuclei...
steps.instruction: Take 200 uL of the nuclei band and put into 1.5 mL LoBind tube

steps.title: Dilute nuclei by adding 200 uL...
steps.instruction: Dilute nuclei by adding 200 uL of wash buffer and mix by pipetting

steps.title: Count nuclei using trypan blue
steps.instruction: Count nuclei using trypan blue

steps.title: Centrifuge at 500 xg for 5 min at 4c
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500 xg for 5 min at 4c

steps.title: Remove supernatant without disrupting pellet
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant without disrupting pellet

steps.title: resuspend in x uL of chilled...
steps.instruction: resuspend in x uL of chilled Nuclei Buffer (depending on what isolated nuclei are used for) to achieve target concentration based on count.
